火爆口哈希作为竞赛电竞竞猜，@duotebb 也成为了众多娱乐大众的选择。通过区块链上的开奖结果，作为大会奖的结果，可以算得上多少人彩彩投注平台的不同玩法下赢了，从接受多少彩排到集散地派送的整个过程。或者动不动就被大众打宣传不开微信盘口运营的话还是有很大的优势的。

哈希中，也指区块链的算法名称，也称为区块链区块链区块链区块链。将任意长度的数据输入，通过散列算法固定长度的数据输出，而这个就是散列值了。简单来说，散列值就是找到一种内容和数据存储地址之间的数据输出关系散列值的空间通常远小于输入的空间，不同的输入数据会散列成相同的输出数据。

当通过散列算法的时候，整个计算散列算法是不可篡改的，没有经过验证的应用技术的性质，所以散列算法也被广泛应用于散列与散列列表；几何散列；加密散列；关联目录】

  1. 散列---指一种使用散列函数将键名和键值关联起来的数据结构；
  2. 几何散列---寻找相同或相似的几何形状的一种方法； 3.加密散列---指在信息安全领域使用； 4.附件---一种常用的使用散列表来的数据结构；散列技术的实现就是基于散列函数的，可以理解为撒捏函数就是在实现信息压缩，把消息字符串压缩成分数摘要，根据数量变小，固定格式下来。

散列函数构造方法主要结合六点：

  1. 折叠法
  2. 数字分析法
  3. 平方取中法
  4. 普通法
  5. 直接地址法
  6. 除留余量为散列函数中的关键值，将函数的一个基本单位法的分布排列到一系列的任意位置上，这种均匀分布的碰撞，和散列算法简单快捷，散列值生成这两个方面。由此看来，散列函数的简单散列数据结构来说，散列函数的机构也是十分关键的。

区块链是一种去中心化化的，将交易通过共识记录，数据不可篡改记录技术，可对数据进行加密，并保证数据隐私安全，确保信息安全共享。 、网络层、共识层、契约层和应用层。

主要有三点优势：

1.数据安全。区块链在后续的发展中主要有3种形式，分别是公有链、私有链和联盟链。公有链是已经完全去中心化的区块链类型，并且所有节点具有等同的权限，不能篡改区块链里面的数据。 1. 安全区块链在3个链的形式中，分别是有链公有链的类型，分别是有链公有链的类型，并且所有链公链的存在链发展的类型。权限，不能篡改区块链里面的数据。

2.数据确权。区块链上每一项数据的使用权、处置权、收益权等可通过数字签名和智能合约进行保障。 2. 每一条数据链上的数据使用权、通知权、通知权等可通过数字签名和智能合约进行保障。

3.数据监管。数据一旦被储存到区块链的节点上，任何人都无法篡改，它的防篡改性，主要是源于下一区块的哈希值是通过上一区块的哈希值和当前区块哈希值计算得出的结果，每个新区块都会与上一区块进行关联，因此，很难被篡改。 3.数据监管。数据被存储到区块链的节点上，任何人都无法篡改，它的防破坏，主要是未来区块链的哈希是通过上一区块的哈希算出当前值和当前区块的结果，每条新区块变更与上一区块进行关联，因此，被恶意篡改。



原文:

哈希娱乐竞猜游戏非常火爆，搭建哈希竞猜平台盘口【TG电报@ duotebb】也成为越来越多人的选择。通过区块链上的转账生成的哈希值作为开奖结果，以尾数作为号码来计算不同玩法下的输赢，从接受投注到采集哈希结算派彩返奖，整个过程都是程序自动化的。可以说算得上是团队不需要多少人员就能运营起来。对比起传统的信用盘或者动不动就被多人举报打不开微信盘口运营来说还是有很大的优势的。

哈希游戏来源于主采用了区块链中的一项算法叫哈希算法，也叫区块哈希。主要用于信息安全领域当中。哈希英译为Hash一般也称为散列，指将任意长度的数据输入，通过散列算法变成固定长度的数据输出，而这个输出就是散列值了。简单来说，散列值就是找到一种数据内容和数据储存地址之间的映射关系。散列值的空间通常远小于输入的空间，不同的输入数据会散列成相同的输出数据。

当通过散列算法计算散列值时，整个过程是具有不可篡改、不可逆的性质的，所以散列算法也被广泛运用与加密技术上。散列的运用主要在【散列表；几何散列；加密散列；关联数组】

  1. 散列表---指一种使用散列函数将键名和键值关联起来的数据结构；
  2. 几何散列---指寻找相同或者相似的几何形状的一种有效方法； 3.加密散列---指在信息安全领域使用； 4.关联数组---指一种常常使用散列表来实现的数据结构； 散列技术的实现就是基于散列函数的，可以理解为撒捏函数就是在实现信息压缩，把消息字符串压缩成数值摘要，根据数量变小，固定下来格式。

散列函数构造方法主要结合六点：

  1. 折叠法
  2. 数字分析法
  3. 平方取中法
  4. 随机法
  5. 直接地址法
  6. 除留余法 散列函数的结构基本就在于对Key值集合中的任意关键字，散列函数都能够均匀概率的映射到数组的任意一个索引位置上，这种均匀能够减少散列碰撞，和散列算法简单快捷，散列值生成简单这两个方面。由此看来，对于散列表这种数据结构来说，散列函数的机构也是十分关键的。

区块链是一种去中心化的账本技术，将交易记录通过达成共识记录，数据不可篡改，并且可对数据进行加密，保证数据隐私安全，确保信息安全共享。区块链的架构由数据层、网络层、共识层、合约层和应用层构成。

主要有三点优势：

1.数据安全。区块链在后续的发展中主要有3种形式，分别是公有链、私有链和联盟链。公有链是已经完全去中心化的区块链类型，并且所有节点具有等同的权限，不能篡改区块链里面的数据。

2.数据确权。区块链上每一项数据的使用权、处置权、收益权等可通过数字签名和智能合约进行保障。

3.数据监管。数据一旦被储存到区块链的节点上，任何人都无法篡改，它的防篡改性，主要是源于下一区块的哈希值是通过上一区块的哈希值和当前区块哈希值计算得出的结果，每个新区块都会与上一区块进行关联，因此，很难被篡改。

item.title: 什么是 Azure Arc？ | What is Azure Arc ?.
item.description:
如今，公司努力控制和管理跨数据中心、 multiple clouds和边缘的日益复杂的环境。 每个环境和云都有自己的一套管理工具，新的 DevOps 和 ITOps 操作模型很难跨资源实施。

通过将我们现有的非 Azure 和/或本地资源投射到 Azure 资源管理器中，共同管理我们的整个环境。

  • 管理virtual machines, Kubernetes clusters, and databases ，就像它们在 Azure 中运行一样。
  • 无论身在何处，都可以使用熟悉的 Azure 服务和管理功能。
  • 继续使用传统的 ITOps，同时引入DevOps practices to support new cloud native patterns 。
  • 将自定义位置配置为启用 Azure Arc 的 Kubernetes 集群和集群扩展之上的抽象层。

    • 目前，Azure Arc 允许我们管理托管在 Azure 之外的以下资源类型：

    服务器

    管理在 Azure 之外托管的 Windows 和 Linux 物理服务器和虚拟机。

    附加和配置在任何地方运行的 Kubernetes 集群，支持多个发行版。

    使用 Kubernetes 和您选择的基础架构在本地、边缘和公共云中运行 Azure 数据服务。 将 Azure 服务扩展到托管在 Azure 之外的 SQL Server 实例。

    虚拟机（预览）

    基于VMware vSphere或Azure Stack HCI配置、调整大小、删除和管理虚拟机，并通过基于角色的访问启用 VM 自助服务。

    主要特点和优势

    在我们的环境中为服务器实施consistent的清单、管理、治理和安全性。

  • 配置Azure VM 扩展以使用 Azure 管理服务来监控、保护和更新我们的服务器。
  • 大规模管理和治理 Kubernetes 集群。
  • 使用 Azure Policy 实现 Kubernetes 集群Zero-touch compliance和配置。
  • 在任何 Kubernetes 环境中运行Azure 数据服务，就好像它在 Azure 中运行一样（特别是 Azure SQL 托管实例和 Azure Database for PostgreSQL Hyperscale，具有升级、更新、安全和监控等优势）。 使用弹性扩展并应用更新，无需任何应用程序停机，即使没有与 Azure 的持续连接。
  • 在我们启用 Azure Arc 的 Kubernetes 集群之上创建自定义位置，将它们用作部署 Azure 服务实例的目标位置。 为启用 Azure Arc 的数据服务、 Azure Arc 上的应用服务（包括 Web、函数和逻辑应用）和Kubernetes 上的事件网格部署我们的 Azure 服务集群扩展。
  • 为 VMware vSphere 和 Azure Stack HCI 环境执行virtual machine lifecycle and management operations 。
  • 无论您使用的是 Azure 门户、Azure CLI、Azure PowerShell 还是 Azure REST API，都可以提供查看我们启用了 Azure Arc 的资源的unified experience 。

    • 有关 Azure Arc 的详细信息，请参阅此处。

    感谢您阅读我的文章直到最后。 我希望你今天学到了一些特别的东西。 如果您喜欢这篇文章，请分享给您的朋友，如果您有建议或想法与我分享，请在评论框中写下。

    安德里亚·格里洛 - 彼得安德鲁 - 中村健一郎—— Dec 21 '21 21 年 12 月 21 日



    原文:

    Today, companies struggle to control and govern increasingly complex environments that extend across data centers, multiple clouds, and edge. Each environment and cloud possesses its own set of management tools, and new DevOps and ITOps operational models can be hard to implement across resources.

    Azure Arc simplifies governance and management by delivering a consistent multi-cloud and on-premises management platform.

    Azure Arc provides a centralized, unified way to:

    • Manage our entire environment together by projecting our existing non-Azure and/or on-premises resources into Azure Resource Manager.
    • Manage virtual machines, Kubernetes clusters, and databases as if they are running in Azure.
    • Use familiar Azure services and management capabilities, regardless of where they live.
    • Continue using traditional ITOps while introducing DevOps practices to support new cloud native patterns in our environment.
    • Configure custom locations as an abstraction layer on top of Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters and cluster extensions.

    Currently, Azure Arc allows us to manage the following resource types hosted outside of Azure:

    Servers

    Manage Windows and Linux physical servers and virtual machines hosted outside of Azure.

    Kubernetes clusters

    Attach and configure Kubernetes clusters running anywhere, with multiple supported distributions.

    Azure data services

    Run Azure data services on-premises, at the edge, and in public clouds using Kubernetes and the infrastructure of your choice. SQL Managed Instance and PostgreSQL Hyperscale (preview) services are currently available.

    SQL Server

    Extend Azure services to SQL Server instances hosted outside of Azure.

    Virtual machines (preview)

    Provision, resize, delete and manage virtual machines based on VMware vSphere or Azure Stack HCI and enable VM self-service through role-based access.

    Key features and benefits

    Some of the key scenarios that Azure Arc supports are:

    • Implement consistent inventory, management, governance, and security for servers across our environment.
    • Configure Azure VM extensions to use Azure management services to monitor, secure, and update our servers.
    • Manage and govern Kubernetes clusters at scale.
    • Use GitOps to deploy configuration across one or more clusters from Git repositories.
    • Zero-touch compliance and configuration for Kubernetes clusters using Azure Policy.
    • Run Azure data services on any Kubernetes environment as if it runs in Azure (specifically Azure SQL Managed Instance and Azure Database for PostgreSQL Hyperscale, with benefits such as upgrades, updates, security, and monitoring). Use elastic scale and apply updates without any application downtime, even without continuous connection to Azure.
    • Create custom locations on top of our Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters, using them as target locations for deploying Azure services instances. Deploy our Azure service cluster extensions for Azure Arc-enabled Data Services, App Services on Azure Arc (including web, function, and logic apps) and Event Grid on Kubernetes.
    • Perform virtual machine lifecycle and management operations for VMware vSphere and Azure Stack HCI environments.
    • A unified experience viewing our Azure Arc-enabled resources, whether you are using the Azure portal, the Azure CLI, Azure PowerShell, or Azure REST API.

    For more information on Azure Arc, refer here.

    Thanks for reading my article till end. I hope you learned something special today. If you enjoyed this article then please share to your friends and if you have suggestions or thoughts to share with me then please write in the comment box.

    Andrea Grillo - Dec 24 '21

    Peter Andrew - Nov 22 '21

    Kenichiro Nakamura - Dec 21 '21
item.author: makendrang

item.title: 带有 CA 颁发者的简单 PKI | Simple PKI with CA issuer
item.description:
发表于本次研讨会将模拟我们如何使用 PKI 进行安全通信的场景。 我们在终端上进行的所有此会话，您可以逐步进行。

在最后的课程中，我们学习了如何在一个简单的案例中使用公钥/私钥。 我解释了实施解决方案的研讨会。 然后，我们升级到高级研讨会，了解如何实现公共/私有 CA 中间服务器。

如果您没有阅读上一个主题，您可以访问：

  • 在 pki 中我们应该知道什么
  • 使用 pki 最简单的小步骤

先决条件

创建根 CA 证书

首先，我们将通过以下步骤生成简单的自签名根 CA 证书：

 $ openssl genrsa -out rootCAkey.pem 4096 Generating RSA private key, 4096 bit long modulus ( 2 primes ) .........................................++++ .........++++ e is 65537 ( 0x010001 )

我们生成具有 4,096 个字符的随机密钥，您可以使用其他长度，例如 1024、2048、8192 或 ETC。 您可以增加或减少您的密钥长度以优化 CPU 处理它们的能力。

  1. 从私钥创建证书
$ openssl req -x509 -sha256 -new -nodes -key rootCAkey.pem \ -days 14 -out rootCAcert.pem You are about to be asked to enter information that will be incorporated into your certificate request. What you are about to enter is what is called a Distinguished Name or a DN. There are quite a few fields but you can leave some blank For some fields there will be a default value, If you enter '.' , the field will be left blank. ----- Country Name ( 2 letter code ) [ AU]:TH State or Province Name ( full name ) [ Some-State]:Bangkok Locality Name ( eg, city ) [] :BangKhea Organization Name ( eg, company ) [ Internet Widgits Pty Ltd]:Opsta Thailand Organizational Unit Name ( eg, section ) [] :DevOps Common Name ( eg server FQDN or YOUR name ) [] :OpstaRootCA Email Address [] :watcharin@opsta.co.th

对于前面的命令，我请求一个包含一些信息的新证书文件。 我使用摘要算法SHA-256并将其设置为在14 天之前过期。 它会在您的终端上显示添加更多信息的提示。 您可以在上面看到一个示例。

  1. 现在，我们可以验证自己的根 CA
 openssl x509 -text -in rootCAcert.pem

您可以看到您的证书信息。 然后进行下一步创建链式证书。

使用颁发者创建服务器证书

  1. 生成具有相同步骤根 CA 的随机私钥
# You can replace rsaServerKey.pem to your name # And can change key size from 2048 to other length $ openssl genrsa -out rsaServerKey.pem 2048 Generating RSA private key, 2048 bit long modulus ( 2 primes ) ......................................................................+++++ ...............+++++ e is 65537 ( 0x010001 )
  1. 创建为 CSR 提供​​元数据的 CNF 文件
# req.cnf [req] req_extensions = v3_req distinguished_name = dn prompt = no [dn] CN = ssl-lab.example.local C = TH L = Bangkok O = Opsta Thailand OU = DevOps [v3_req] subjectAltName = @san_names [san_names] DNS.1 = ssl-lab.example.local DNS.2 = localhost DNS.3 = 127.0.0.1

提供简单的配置来创建 CSR 文件。 该文件在[san_names]中有 3 个名称的SAN（主题备用名称） 。 对于@san_names ，我使用扩展服务器的替代名称。

 $ openssl req -new -out req.csr -key rsaServerKey.pem -sha256 -config req.cnf $ cat req.csr -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE REQUEST----- MIIC9zCCAd8CAQAwaTEeMBwGA1UEAwwVc3NsLWxhYi5leGFtcGxlLmxvY2FsMQsw CQYDVQQGEwJUSDEQMA4GA1UEBwwHQmFuZ2tvazEXMBUGA1UECgwOT3BzdGEgVGhh aWxhbmQxDzANBgNVBAsMBkRldk9wczCCASIwDQYJKoZIhvcNAQEBBQADggEPADCC … k9jkEKhPeICqJgHLbyiEcEc9xaPTMPb35cBQT8irnUq1+WbQamhWDIBmwzDHCSyf jCK672ACRleQCj8kk5l+dOB0wzWEaDcCoQNwIwqg2RpfDKc1lHARroBzm1P/4grg NaF5EYJJWhXUXGKq68meHpCTGzgC7M06rwBdOR+8l0GIUZ5K25MvNg3+ZA == -----END CERTIFICATE REQUEST-----
  1. 验证 CSR 信息，我们专注于 Requested Extension。
 $ openssl req -in req.csr -noout -text … Requested Extensions: X509v3 Subject Alternative Name: DNS:ssl-lab.example.local, DNS:localhost, DNS:127.0.0.1
  1. 使用 CSR 文件创建具有根 CA 的受信任证书
$ openssl x509 -req -sha256 -in req.csr -CA ../rootCAcert.pem \ -CAkey ../rootCAkey.pem -CAcreateserial -out CertServer.pem -days 7 … Signature ok subject = CN = ssl-lab.example.local, C = TH, L = Bangkok, O = Opsta Thailand, OU = DevOps Getting CA Private Key

我们使用摘要算法SHA-256创建受信任的证书，并创建根 CA 序列来跟踪使用-CAcreateserial颁发了多少证书，因此如果不是第一个证书，您将使用-CAserial代替。 然后，此证书将仅保留 7 天。

  1. 验证应具有颁发者的证书信息
$ openssl x509 -text -in CertServer.pem … Issuer: C = TH, ST = Bangkok, L = BangKhea, O = Opsta Thailand, OU = DevOps, CN = OpstaRootCA, emailAddress = watcharin@opsta.co.th

我们将在证书>>数据下看到颁发者信息。

结论

现在您可以用上一个会话（也是主题名称little-step-to-use-pki-easyest ）替换此证书和私钥并再次测试。 您将自定义根 CA 安装到您的浏览器或机器上，以查看单个自签名证书和具有 CA 颁发者的证书之间的区别。



原文:

Watcharin(start)

Posted on May 22

This workshop will simulate the scenario in how we can use PKI to make secure communication. All this session we work on terminal, you can following in step-by-step.

In the late session, we learned about how to use public/private keys in an easy case. I explained the workshop to implement a solution. Then, We upgrade to an advanced workshop to understand how to implement public/private CA intermediate servers.

If you are not read previous topic, you can go to:

  • what-we-should-know-in-pki
  • little-step-to-use-pki-easiest

Prerequisite

Create root CA certificate

In first thing, we will generate simple self-sign root CA certificate with following step: 

 $ openssl genrsa -out rootCAkey.pem 4096 Generating RSA private key, 4096 bit long modulus (2 primes) .........................................++++ .........++++ e is 65537 (0x010001)

We generate random keys with 4,096 character and you can use other lengths like 1024, 2048, 8192, or ETC. You can increase or decrease your key length to optimize cpu power to process them.

  1. Create Certificate from private key 
 $ openssl req -x509 -sha256 -new -nodes -key rootCAkey.pem \ -days 14 -out rootCAcert.pem You are about to be asked to enter information that will be incorporated into your certificate request. What you are about to enter is what is called a Distinguished Name or a DN. There are quite a few fields but you can leave some blank For some fields there will be a default value, If you enter '.', the field will be left blank. ----- Country Name (2 letter code) [AU]:TH State or Province Name (full name) [Some-State]:Bangkok Locality Name (eg, city) []:BangKhea Organization Name (eg, company) [Internet Widgits Pty Ltd]:Opsta Thailand Organizational Unit Name (eg, section) []:DevOps Common Name (e.g. server FQDN or YOUR name) []:OpstaRootCA Email Address []:watcharin@opsta.co.th

For the previous command, I request a new certificate file with some information. I use the digest algorithm SHA-256 and set it to expire before 14 days. It shows a prompt on your terminal for adding more information. You can see an example above.

  1. Now, we can verify own root CA 
 openssl x509 -text -in rootCAcert.pem

You can see your certificate information. Then go to the next step to create a chain certificate.

Create server certificate with issuer

  1. Generate random private key with same step root CA 
 # You can replace rsaServerKey.pem to your name # And can change key size from 2048 to other length $ openssl genrsa -out rsaServerKey.pem 2048 Generating RSA private key, 2048 bit long modulus (2 primes) ......................................................................+++++ ...............+++++ e is 65537 (0x010001)
  1. Create CNF file that provide meta data for CSR 
 # req.cnf
 [req] req_extensions = v3_req distinguished_name = dn prompt = no [dn] CN = ssl-lab.example.local C = TH L = Bangkok O = Opsta Thailand OU = DevOps [v3_req] subjectAltName = @san_names [san_names] DNS.1 = ssl-lab.example.local DNS.2 = localhost DNS.3 = 127.0.0.1

Provide simple configuration to create CSR file. This file has SAN(Subject Alternative Name) with 3 names in [san_names]. For @san_names, I use for extend alternative name for server.

 $ openssl req -new -out req.csr -key rsaServerKey.pem -sha256 -config req.cnf $ cat req.csr -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE REQUEST----- MIIC9zCCAd8CAQAwaTEeMBwGA1UEAwwVc3NsLWxhYi5leGFtcGxlLmxvY2FsMQsw CQYDVQQGEwJUSDEQMA4GA1UEBwwHQmFuZ2tvazEXMBUGA1UECgwOT3BzdGEgVGhh aWxhbmQxDzANBgNVBAsMBkRldk9wczCCASIwDQYJKoZIhvcNAQEBBQADggEPADCC … k9jkEKhPeICqJgHLbyiEcEc9xaPTMPb35cBQT8irnUq1+WbQamhWDIBmwzDHCSyf jCK672ACRleQCj8kk5l+dOB0wzWEaDcCoQNwIwqg2RpfDKc1lHARroBzm1P/4grg NaF5EYJJWhXUXGKq68meHpCTGzgC7M06rwBdOR+8l0GIUZ5K25MvNg3+ZA== -----END CERTIFICATE REQUEST-----
  1. Verify CSR information, we focus on Requested Extension. 
 $ openssl req -in req.csr -noout -text
   …
   Requested Extensions:
               X509v3 Subject Alternative Name: 
                   DNS:ssl-lab.example.local, DNS:localhost, DNS:127.0.0.1
  1. Create trusted certificate with root CA with CSR file 
 $ openssl x509 -req -sha256 -in req.csr -CA ../rootCAcert.pem \  -CAkey ../rootCAkey.pem -CAcreateserial -out CertServer.pem -days 7 … Signature ok subject=CN = ssl-lab.example.local, C = TH, L = Bangkok, O = Opsta Thailand, OU = DevOps
   Getting CA Private Key

We create trusted certificates with digest algorithm SHA-256 and create root CA serials that track how many certificates were issued with -CAcreateserial , so if not the first certificate you will use -CAserial instead. Then, this certificate will stay for 7 days only.

  1. Verify certificate information that should have issuer 
 $ openssl x509 -text -in CertServer.pem … Issuer: C = TH, ST = Bangkok, L = BangKhea, O = Opsta Thailand, OU = DevOps, CN = OpstaRootCA, emailAddress = watcharin@opsta.co.th

We will see Issuer information under Certificate >> Data.

Conclusion

Now you can replace this certificate and private key with the previous session (also topic name little-step-to-use-pki-easiest) and test again. You will install your custom root CA to your browser or machine to see a difference between a single self-signed certificate and certificate with CA issuer.
item.author: startpher

item.title: 使用 vanilla Javascript 创建视差滚动效果 | Create parallax scrolling effect with vanilla Javascript
item.description:
视差滚动是一种非常酷的视觉效果，广泛用于动画电影中，它确实可以为您网站的用户带来出色的沉浸式体验。

演示：

本教程需要一些准备好的图像，您可以在GitHub 存储库中找到这些图像。

视频教程

如果您想观看详细的分步视频，则可以查看我在我的 Youtube 频道上制作的涵盖该项目的视频：

在本教程中，我将使用一种 Google 字体（“Roboto”），因此如果您想使用它，请不要忘记将它包含在 HTML 文档的 head 部分中。 我还将包括我们稍后将创建的样式表。

 <head> <meta charset= "UTF-8" > <meta name= "viewport" content= "width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" > <link rel= "stylesheet" href= "style.css" > <link href= "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@900&display=swap" rel= "stylesheet" > <title> Document </title> </head>

在文档的正文中，我们将有两个主要部分。 第一个将是实际的视差滚动效果，第二个将是模拟页面内容。

让我们首先创建视差滚动效果所需的 HTML。 在本节中，我们将添加我们准备的所有图像。 确保给他们一个唯一且有意义的 id，因为我们稍后会使用它们。 我还将添加一个带有 id 的标题。

 <section> <img src= "./images/road.png" id= "road" alt= "" > <img src= "./images/mountains.png" id= "mountain" alt= "" > <img src= "./images/moon.png" id= "moon" alt= "" > <img src= "./images/sky.jpg" id= "sky" alt= "" > <h1 id= "midnight" > Midnight </h1> </section>

现在是时候添加模拟页面部分了。 这个非常简单，它只包含一个标题和一个段落。 在该段落中，我只有一些占位符文本（lorem ipsum）。

 <section class= "welcome" > <h1> Midnight </h1> <p> Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Etiam rutrum ante ante. Donec sagittis ultricies venenatis. Proin non neque ex. Suspendisse tristique lorem ac laoreet laoreet. Maecenas viverra, erat at laoreet convallis, felis leo gravida est, nec ullamcorper nibh metus ac magna. Etiam pretium eu purus et congue. Nullam placerat nisi a pellentesque aliquam. Quisque consequat placerat arcu id dapibus. Curabitur odio ligula, accumsan nec velit ac, accumsan tempor justo. Nulla sit amet nisl in purus viverra maximus quis et nunc. Fusce rhoncus justo a posuere aliquam. Nam fringilla mauris vitae enim mattis, non ullamcorper massa facilisis. Cras eu erat nisl. Aliquam tempus nulla ex. Aliquam tristique a nisi ac mollis. Mauris condimentum lobortis nisi eu sagittis. Aenean pharetra fringilla varius. Phasellus id nulla eget massa bibendum pellentesque et quis ligula. Suspendisse potenti. Ut rutrum, nisi at maximus suscipit, ipsum ligula egestas tellus, quis lobortis ligula mauris a erat. Duis placerat dui at neque commodo laoreet. Aenean molestie quam id nunc aliquam aliquam. Donec sed hendrerit ipsum. Phasellus vitae metus in quam iaculis tincidunt. Nam ac ligula ac nulla rutrum convallis. Duis ac magna ex. Vestibulum efficitur justo sit amet ex finibus tempor. Aliquam nibh risus, ultrices id turpis eu, dapibus tempus eros. Nam consectetur lobortis felis. Morbi ac congue augue. Aliquam gravida magna ut nunc pretium, non accumsan justo aliquet. Morbi mauris leo, consequat non odio ut, dignissim dictum nisi. Maecenas eget neque ipsum. Phasellus condimentum risus eu cursus vestibulum. Integer efficitur fringilla nunc id volutpat. Morbi vel mauris vitae lectus scelerisque blandit. Fusce ut libero justo. Vivamus vitae finibus nulla. Nulla at enim vulputate diam dignissim ullamcorper sollicitudin ut nunc. Vestibulum ultrices hendrerit urna, vel tincidunt leo faucibus sit amet. Morbi vel leo ac diam euismod commodo. Nulla a interdum lectus, eu laoreet tellus. In tempus, nisl id posuere mattis, erat odio vestibulum elit, in consectetur magna massa at libero. Integer dapibus vulputate convallis. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer in risus maximus tortor commodo aliquet id ac quam. Cras ac venenatis ipsum. Fusce sit amet hendrerit lorem. Quisque leo dui, cursus at nisi scelerisque, ultrices iaculis augue. Morbi dapibus tellus sem, sed maximus eros scelerisque sit amet. Sed eget leo viverra, dictum neque at, posuere urna. Aliquam laoreet quam ac est malesuada, eu blandit dolor sollicitudin. Aliquam erat volutpat. Duis mi erat, semper ac finibus sit amet, consequat a augue. Curabitur diam diam, malesuada quis aliquam ut, laoreet nec augue. Donec non ipsum a turpis sollicitudin rhoncus in id arcu. </p> </section> <script src= "index.js" ></script>

不要忘记在正文的最后一行添加 index.js 文件。 这就是我们在这个项目中需要的所有 HTML 标记。

首先，我将删除所有浏览器默认填充和边距，并使网站采用视口的全部宽度和高度。 我还将字体设置为包含的 Roboto Google 字体。

 * { margin : 0 ; padding : 0 ; } body { min-height : 100vh ; max-width : 100vw ; font-family : 'Roboto' , sans-serif ; }

接下来，我将部分的定位设置为相对，这样我们就可以相对于部分定位我们的图像。 我将使用 flexbox 使内容居中，使用overflow: hidden; 并使其 100% 宽且高。

关于图像，我们将设置绝对定位并将它们放在彼此的顶部并使其全宽。

 body section { position : relative ; width : 100% ; height : 100% ; overflow : hidden ; display : flex ; align-items : center ; justify-content : center ; } section img { position : absolute ; left : 0 ; top : 0 ; width : 100% ; height : 100% ; object-fit : cover ; pointer-events : none ; }

为了获得更好的视觉轮廓，我将在页面上添加一个蓝色叠加层以隐藏图像之间的颜色差异。 确保它具有较高的 z-index 值，因为它必须位于其他所有内容的顶部，并且具有 100% 的宽度和高度。

 section :after { content : '' ; position : absolute ; top : 0 ; left : 0 ; width : 100% ; height : 100% ; background : #051b61 ; z-index : 5 ; mix-blend-mode : color ; }

接下来，我们将确保视觉层次结构到位。 我们可以通过对齐 z-index 值来做到这一点。 较高的值意味着图像必须位于较低 z 索引图像的顶部。

 #road { z-index : 3 ; } #mountain { z-index : 1 ; top : 150px ; } #sky { z-index : 0 ; } #moon { z-index : 1 ; }

接下来，我们将为文本及其容器添加一些基本样式。 由于它与项目的主要目标没有密切联系，我不会详细解释它，但这里是代码：

 #midnight { top : 120px ; position : relative ; color : #ffffff ; font-size : 12rem ; z-index : 2 ; text-shadow : 0 1px 0 #CCCCCC , 0 2px 0 #c9c9c9 , 0 3px 0 #bbb , 0 4px 0 #b9b9b9 , 0 5px 0 #aaa , 0 6px 1px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .1 ), 0 0 5px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .1 ), 0 1px 3px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .3 ), 0 3px 5px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .2 ), 0 5px 10px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .25 ), 0 10px 10px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .2 ), 0 20px 20px rgba ( 0 , 0 , 0 , .15 ); } .welcome { color : #fff ; text-align : center ; width : 100% ; display : flex ; flex-direction : column ; justify-content : center ; align-items : center ; } .welcome h1 { font-size : 10rem ; margin-top : 10% ; padding-left : 70px ; padding-right : 70px ; } .welcome p { margin-top : 50px ; font-weight : normal ; line-height : 1.6 ; padding-left : 70px ; padding-right : 70px ; }

添加 JavaScript

我们在 javascript 中要做的第一件事是将引用保存到要添加视差效果的所有元素的变量中。 对我来说，这将是road 、 mountain 、 sky 、 moon 、 midnight 。 只需确保您在 HTML 标记中使用了这些 ID。

 let road = document . getElementById ( ' road ' ); let mountain = document . getElementById ( ' mountain ' ); let sky = document . getElementById ( ' sky ' ); let moon = document . getElementById ( ' moon ' ); let midnight = document . getElementById ( ' midnight ' );

现在我们有了所有需要的 DOM 元素的参考。 是时候为页面的scroll event添加一个事件监听器了。 我们可以使用window对象的addEventListener方法来做到这一点。 确保提供'scroll'作为第一个参数。

我们还将在回调函数中保存窗口对象的scrollY值。 这将告诉我们网站当前从其原始位置向下滚动了多少像素。 有关 window.scrollY 的更多信息。

笔记：
我们正在使用对象解构从窗口对象中检索数据。 如果你不熟悉现代 javascript，这个解构赋值与我们写的let scrollY = window.scrollY相同。
现在为了使视差效果起作用，我们将使用所选元素的top和left值。 如果修改顶部（或底部）值会影响元素的垂直滚动，如果修改左（或右）值会影响元素的水平滚动。

我们有两个选择：我们可以使用初始偏移量并调整元素的滚动速度。

让我们看看我们对road元素做了什么。 如您所见，我们将 scrollY 值乘以 0.5。 这将使道路滚动比正常滚动慢 2 倍。

我们可以添加一个固定偏移量来改变元素的起始位置。 我们只需要得到偏移量的总和和 scrollY 的乘积。 就像我们对mountain或midnight做的那样。 随意玩弄这些数字，看看什么最适合你。

 window . addEventListener ( ' scroll ' , () => { let { scrollY } = window ; road . style . top = 0.5 * scrollY + ' px ' ; mountain . style . top = ( 150 + 0.05 * scrollY ) + ' px ' ; moon . style . left = 1.1 * scrollY + ' px ' ; sky . style . top = - 1.2 * scrollY + ' px ' ; midnight . style . top = ( 120 + - 1.5 * scrollY ) + ' px ' ; });

现在视差滚动效果完美无缺。 谢谢阅读！

你在哪里可以向我学习更多？

我在多个平台上创建了涵盖 Web 开发的教育内容，请随时 👀 检查它们。

我还创建了一个时事通讯，在其中分享我创建的一周或两周的教育内容。 没有公牛💩只是教育内容。

🔗 Links: 🔗 链接：



原文:

Parallax scrolling is a really cool visual effect that is widely used in animation movies, and it can really make an outstanding, immersive experience for the users of your website.

Demo:

Some prepared images are needed for this tutorial you can find those in the GitHub repository.

Video tutorial

If you would watch a detailed step-by-step video instead you can check out the video I made covering this project on my Youtube Channel:

HTML markup

In this tutorial I'll use a Google font ("Roboto") so if you want to use it don't forget to include it in the head section of the HTML document. I'll aslo include the stylesheet that we will create later.

<head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <title>Document</title>
</head>

In the body of the document we will have two main sections. The first one will be the actual parallax scrolling effect and the second one will be mock page content.

Let's first create the HTML needed for the parallax scrolling effect. In this section we will add all the images that we prepared. Make sure that you give them a unique and meaningful id, because we will use these later. I'll also add a title with an id too.

<section> <img src="./images/road.png" id="road"alt=""> <img src="./images/mountains.png" id="mountain" alt=""> <img src="./images/moon.png" id="moon" alt=""> <img src="./images/sky.jpg" id="sky" alt=""> <h1 id="midnight">Midnight</h1> </section>

Now it's time to add the mock page section. This one will be pretty simple it only contains a heading and a paragraph. In the paragraph I only have some placeholder text (lorem ipsum).

<section class="welcome"> <h1>Midnight</h1> <p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Etiam rutrum ante ante. Donec sagittis ultricies venenatis. Proin non neque ex. Suspendisse tristique lorem ac laoreet laoreet. Maecenas viverra, erat at laoreet convallis, felis leo gravida est, nec ullamcorper nibh metus ac magna. Etiam pretium eu purus et congue. Nullam placerat nisi a pellentesque aliquam. Quisque consequat placerat arcu id dapibus. Curabitur odio ligula, accumsan nec velit ac, accumsan tempor justo. Nulla sit amet nisl in purus viverra maximus quis et nunc. Fusce rhoncus justo a posuere aliquam. Nam fringilla mauris vitae enim mattis, non ullamcorper massa facilisis. Cras eu erat nisl. Aliquam tempus nulla ex. Aliquam tristique a nisi ac mollis. Mauris condimentum lobortis nisi eu sagittis. Aenean pharetra fringilla varius. Phasellus id nulla eget massa bibendum pellentesque et quis ligula. Suspendisse potenti. Ut rutrum, nisi at maximus suscipit, ipsum ligula egestas tellus, quis lobortis ligula mauris a erat. Duis placerat dui at neque commodo laoreet. Aenean molestie quam id nunc aliquam aliquam. Donec sed hendrerit ipsum. Phasellus vitae metus in quam iaculis tincidunt. Nam ac ligula ac nulla rutrum convallis. Duis ac magna ex. Vestibulum efficitur justo sit amet ex finibus tempor. Aliquam nibh risus, ultrices id turpis eu, dapibus tempus eros. Nam consectetur lobortis felis. Morbi ac congue augue. Aliquam gravida magna ut nunc pretium, non accumsan justo aliquet. Morbi mauris leo, consequat non odio ut, dignissim dictum nisi. Maecenas eget neque ipsum. Phasellus condimentum risus eu cursus vestibulum. Integer efficitur fringilla nunc id volutpat. Morbi vel mauris vitae lectus scelerisque blandit. Fusce ut libero justo. Vivamus vitae finibus nulla. Nulla at enim vulputate diam dignissim ullamcorper sollicitudin ut nunc. Vestibulum ultrices hendrerit urna, vel tincidunt leo faucibus sit amet. Morbi vel leo ac diam euismod commodo. Nulla a interdum lectus, eu laoreet tellus. In tempus, nisl id posuere mattis, erat odio vestibulum elit, in consectetur magna massa at libero. Integer dapibus vulputate convallis. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer in risus maximus tortor commodo aliquet id ac quam. Cras ac venenatis ipsum. Fusce sit amet hendrerit lorem. Quisque leo dui, cursus at nisi scelerisque, ultrices iaculis augue. Morbi dapibus tellus sem, sed maximus eros scelerisque sit amet. Sed eget leo viverra, dictum neque at, posuere urna. Aliquam laoreet quam ac est malesuada, eu blandit dolor sollicitudin. Aliquam erat volutpat. Duis mi erat, semper ac finibus sit amet, consequat a augue. Curabitur diam diam, malesuada quis aliquam ut, laoreet nec augue. Donec non ipsum a turpis sollicitudin rhoncus in id arcu.</p> </section> <script src="index.js"></script>

Don't forget to add the index.js file at the last line of the body. And this is all the HTML markup that we need for this project.

CSS implementation

First I'll remove any browser default paddings and margins and make the website take the full width and height of the viewport. I'll also set the font to be the included Roboto Google Font.

* { margin: 0; padding: 0;
} body { min-height: 100vh; max-width: 100vw; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
}

Next I'll set the positioning of the sections to be relative, so we can position our images absolutely relative to the section. I'll center the content using flexbox, remove the scrollbar with the overflow: hidden; and make it 100% wide and high.

Regarding the images, we'll set absolute positioning and place them on top of each other and make them full width.

body section { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
} section img { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; pointer-events: none;
}

For better visual outline I'll add a bluish overlay to the page to hide the color differences between the images. Make sure it has a high z-index value as it has to be top of everything else, and has 100% width and height.

section:after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #051b61; z-index: 5; mix-blend-mode: color;
}

Next we'll make sure that the visual hierarchy is in place. We can do that by aligning the z-index values. The higher value means that the image has to be on the top of lower z-indexed images.

#road { z-index: 3;
} #mountain { z-index: 1; top: 150px;
} #sky { z-index: 0;
} #moon { z-index: 1;
}

Next we will add some basic styling to the texts and their containers. As it is not closely connected to the main goal of the project I won't explain it in details, but here is the code:

#midnight { top: 120px; position: relative; color: #ffffff; font-size: 12rem; z-index: 2; text-shadow: 0 1px 0 #CCCCCC, 0 2px 0 #c9c9c9, 0 3px 0 #bbb, 0 4px 0 #b9b9b9, 0 5px 0 #aaa, 0 6px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.1), 0 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,.1), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3), 0 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.2), 0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.25), 0 10px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.2), 0 20px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
} .welcome { color: #fff; text-align: center; width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
} .welcome h1 { font-size: 10rem; margin-top: 10%; padding-left: 70px; padding-right: 70px; } .welcome p { margin-top: 50px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 1.6; padding-left: 70px; padding-right: 70px; }

Adding JavaScript

The first thing we have to do in javascript is to save references into variables for all the elements that you want to add parallax effect to. For me it will be the road, mountain, sky, moon, midnight. Just make sure that you used these ids in the HTML markup.

let road = document.getElementById('road');
let mountain = document.getElementById('mountain');
let sky = document.getElementById('sky');
let moon = document.getElementById('moon');
let midnight = document.getElementById('midnight');

Now we have reference for all the needed DOM elements. It's time to add an event listener to the scroll event of the page. We can do that with the addEventListener method of the window object. Be sure that you provide 'scroll' as the first parameter.

Also we will save the scrollY value of the window object in the callback function. This will tell us how many pixels the site is currently scrolled down from its original position. More information about window.scrollY.

Note:
We are using object destructuring to retrieve the data from the window object. If you are unfamiliar with modern javascript this destructuring assignment is the same as we would write let scrollY = window.scrollY.
More info about destructuring.

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { let { scrollY } = window;
});

Now to make the parallax effect work we will play around with the top and left values of the selected elements. If you modify the top (or bottom) value it will affect the vertical scrolling of the element, if you modify the left (or right) value it'll affect the horizontal scrolling of the element.

We have two options: we can play with the initial offset and adjust the scrolling speed of the element.

Let's take a look at what we did with the road element. As you can see the we multiply the scrollY value with 0.5. This will make the road scroll 2 times slower than it would normally scroll.

We can add a fix offset to alter the starting position of an element. We just have to get the sum of the offset and the multiplied value of the scrollY. Just we did with the mountain or the midnight. Feel free to play around with these numbers and see what works best for you.

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { let { scrollY } = window; road.style.top = 0.5 * scrollY + 'px'; mountain.style.top = (150 +0.05 * scrollY) + 'px'; moon.style.left = 1.1 * scrollY + 'px'; sky.style.top = -1.2 * scrollY + 'px'; midnight.style.top = (120 + -1.5 * scrollY) + 'px';
});

And now the parallax scrolling effect is working flawlessly. Thanks for reading!

Where can you learn more from me?

I create education content covering web-development on several platforms, feel free to 👀 check them out.

I also create a newsletter where I share the week's or 2 week's educational content that I created. No bull💩 just educational content.

item.title: 让 balenaEtcher 在 macOS Catalina 上工作 | Getting balenaEtcher to Work on macOS Catalina
item.description:
我最近刚刚升级到 macOS Catalina，需要为我的 Raspberry Pi 刷一张 microSD 卡。 但是，balenaEtcher 在尝试刷新图像时抛出错误。

过了一会儿，我意识到 Catalina 包含了一些额外的隐私保护。 我进入系统偏好设置并为balenaEtcher打开了“全盘访问”。 但是你瞧，错误仍然存​​在。

解决方案

经过一番研究，我发现 balenaEtcher 和 Etcher（balenaEtcher 的旧名）有一个命令行实用程序来启动应用程序。

sudo /Applications/balenaEtcher.app/Contents/MacOS/balenaEtcher

该命令启动了balenaEtcher的图形界面，不同之处在于，由于命令中的“sudo”，它在root用户下运行。 这绕过了苹果在 Catalina 上（明智地）设置的安全/隐私限制。



原文:

I just recently upgraded to macOS Catalina, and needed to flash a microSD card for my Raspberry Pi. However, balenaEtcher was throwing an error when trying to flash the image.

After a little while, I realized that Catalina included some extra privacy protections. I went into System Preferences and turned on “Full Disk Access” for balenaEtcher. But lo and behold, the error still persisted.

The Solution

After doing a bit of research, I found that balenaEtcher, and Etcher (the former name of balenaEtcher), had a command-line utility to launch the app.

sudo /Applications/balenaEtcher.app/Contents/MacOS/balenaEtcher

The command booted up a graphical interface of balenaEtcher, the difference that, because of the “sudo” in the command, it ran under the root user. This bypassed the security/privacy restrictions placed (wisely) by Apple on Catalina.

item.title: ssh 和 'warning: setlocale: LC_CTYPE: cannot change locale (UTF-8): No such file or directory' | ssh and 'warning: setlocale: LC_CTYPE: cannot change locale (UTF-8): No such file or directory'
item.description:
这篇文章是关于一个今天在谷歌上搜索似乎相当普遍的问题，并且对此有很多困惑。 我想我已经对它有了相当好的理解，所以希望能消除一些困惑，我创建了这篇博文。

这篇文章是关于当您在使用 ssh 登录到 linux 系统时在 Mac OSX 上应用更新后遇到以下可怕的行时：

 warning: setlocale: LC_CTYPE: cannot change locale (UTF-8): No such file or directory

这只是一个消息，它允许你继续。 但是，许多使用“语言环境”（语言细节）的东西可能会停止运行，或产生错误。 这是令人困惑的一点：因为它不会立即阻止您的工作，任何实际的崩溃（例如 perl 崩溃）可能看起来是随机的。

当我在客户端进行修补时，我确实遇到了第一次。 修补意味着事情会失败，因此是时间敏感的。 所以这真的很令人沮丧。 我确实找到了根本原因，并向供应商提供了我正在修补的软件，然后供应商将其放入其非公开问题数据库中，而没有做任何事情的支持工程师对此表示赞赏。

那么，这里发生了什么？ 这是因为 ssh（安全外壳）机制允许在远程服务器上创建会话的方式具有很大的灵活性，并且某些设置在修补 OSX 时会恢复。 让我们再看一下消息：

 warning: setlocale: LC_CTYPE: cannot change locale (UTF-8): No such file or directory

让我们查询 LC_CTYPE 的环境：

 $ env | grep LC_CTYPE LC_CTYPE=UTF-8

所以这就是原因。 但这似乎是突然设置的？

原因是 ssh 客户端和一个名为“SendEnv”的 ssh 设置，它允许您在登录到远程 ssh 服务器的同时发送环境设置。

那么为什么会突然出现这种情况呢？ 原因是 mac 上有一个全局 ssh客户端设置文件，位于/etc/ssh/ssh_config 。 每次更新 OSX 时，都会重写此文件。 好吧，准确地说：我没有更改此文件，至少更改了全局主机声明（ Host * ）以发送环境变量 LANG 和所有 LC 变量： SendEnv LANG LC_*在 OSX 更新时。

如何解决？ 到目前为止，我发现的唯一可行的解​​决方案是简单地删除LC_* ，因此/etc/ssh/ssh_config中的行变为： SendEnv LANG 。

在~/.ssh/config中有一个用户特定的 ssh_config 文件，但使用该文件似乎只能将环境变量添加到SendEnv ，而不是删除它们。

请注意，还有一个名为/etc/ssh/sshd_config的文件，即 sshd（守护进程）配置，因此是本地 OSX ssh 服务器的配置，因此不是客户端的设置。



原文:

This post is about an issue that upon googling today seems to be quite widespread, and there's a lot of confusion about it. I think I have built a fairly good understanding about it, so to hopefully take away some of the confusion, I have created this blogpost.

This post is about when you encounter the following dreaded line after applying an update on Mac OSX when logging into a linux system with ssh:

warning: setlocale: LC_CTYPE: cannot change locale (UTF-8): No such file or directory

This is just a message, and it allows you to carry on. However, much that uses "locales" (language specifics) can stop functioning, or generate errors. This is the confusing bit: because it doesn't immediately stop you from your work, any actual crashes (such as perl crashing) might seem random.

I did encounter did for the first time when I was doing patching at a client. Patching meant things go down, and therefore are time-sensitive. So that was really frustrating. I did find the root cause, and provided this with the vendor which software I was patching, who then put it in its non-public issue database, and the support engineer who didn't do anything took credits for it.

So, what is happening here? This is happening because of ssh (secure shell) mechanisms allowing lots of flexibility about how a session is created on a remote server, and some settings which gets reverted on patching OSX. Let's look at the message again:

warning: setlocale: LC_CTYPE: cannot change locale (UTF-8): No such file or directory

LC_CTYPE makes linux try to set something. Let's query the environment for LC_CTYPE:

$ env | grep LC_CTYPE
LC_CTYPE=UTF-8

So that is the reason. But how come this seems to be set all of a sudden?

The reason is the ssh client, and a ssh setting called 'SendEnv', which allows you to send environment settings along with logging on to a remote ssh server.

So why does this pop up all of a sudden? The reason is there is a global ssh client settings file on mac at /etc/ssh/ssh_config. Every time OSX is updated, this file gets rewritten. Well, to be very precise: I do not make changes to this file, at least the global host declaration (Host *) is changed to send the environment variables LANG and all LC ones: SendEnv LANG LC_* upon OSX update.

How to solve it? The only viable solution I have found so far is to simply remove LC_*, so the line in /etc/ssh/ssh_config becomes: SendEnv LANG.

There is a user-specific ssh_config file to in ~/.ssh/config, but using that file it only seems to be possible to add environment variables to SendEnv, not remove them.

Please mind there also is a file called /etc/ssh/sshd_config, that is the sshd (daemon) configuration, so the configuration of a local OSX ssh server, and thus NOT the settings for the client.
item.author: fritshooglandyugabyte

item.title: 周刊0013 | Weekly 0013
item.description:
伊曼纽尔·巴托莱西

发表于我起得很早，因为今天是我必须和团队一起去办公室的日子，但我必须先完成很多事情。 首先，我回顾了我们关于 Minimal API 的书的第 01 章。

还不错，只是对某些句子进行了一些修复。 从结构上看，还可以。

我使用 devcontainer 模板创建并更新了一个新的 GitHub 存储库，以开始使用 Codespaces 开发 SPFx 项目。 我想我明天会写一篇博文。

回购链接： https ://github.com/kasuken/SPFxGitHubDevContainer

早上我去苏黎世机场迎接我的团队。 我们一起喝了两个小时咖啡，然后去微软参加了我们的月会。 我们谈了很多关于我们的团队目标、我们的战略和其他东西。 午饭后，我做了一个关于 Network Guardian 的互动演示，我收到了很多反馈。

我们即将推出这款产品。

晚上我不得不写一篇博文，但我太累了。
我明天早上会做。

心情： 😊

周二

今天早上起床有点晚。 我昨天累了，我决定再睡一会儿。

我从早上开始完成关于 Auth0 大使的博客文章。

之后我开始在 Network Guardian 工作。 经过很多小时后，我终于从用户的角度有了一个完整的流程，并将我的所有代码都推送到了 Azure DevOps 上。
我在阳台上工作了一段时间，只是为了改变我的环境。 这太棒了，因为我从那里做了很多事情。 我会不时重复这种工作方式。

下午，我还与我的一位同事通了电话，分析了客户关于 Microsoft 365 和 SharePoint Online 的一些问题。

从工作的角度来看，这是美好的一天。 我很开心。

心情：🙂

周三

早上我与我的一位同事和一位客户打了很长的电话。
我们尝试向客户租户安装解决方案“* Company Communicator” *，但效果不佳。

我想明天我们将尝试手动安装。 这需要更多时间，但也许更安全。

下午我为 Codemotion 录制了三个视频，并为个人资料拍摄了一些照片。
我认为他们将在几周内发布最终视频。

心情：🤔

周四

我们尝试手动安装解决方案，但又失败了。
我的同事下周要放假，所以我会在一周开始时处理这个任务。 我没有太多时间，因为我必须在接下来的几天内完成 Network Guardian。

心情：🤔

星期五

我早上很早就开始了，因为我想骑自行车出去。 我不想在周末进行长时间的训练。
我做到了。

午饭后，我在 Network Guardian 工作。 我实施了一项新功能来检测 Microsoft 365 端点的边缘位置。
它工作得很好，我将等待下周的最终测试。

此外，下周我们必须在客户处部署应用程序。 这是一个大客户，我们需要这个工具启动和运行。

在过去的 2-3 天里，我改变了使用 ToDo 列表的方式，效果更好。 在我的纸质议程上，我只是用项目名称来阻止我的时间，我用概念写下项目的所有任务，我还记下状态和优先级。

它工作得非常好，比我以前的工作方式更好。

在很晚的时候，我回顾了我的博客文章，介绍了一些我每天使用的命令提示符，但我把它推迟到了周六下午。

心情：🦸



原文:

Emanuele Bartolesi

Posted on May 22

I woke up very early because today is the day that I have to go in the office with the team but I have to finalize a lot of stuff before. First of all I have reviewed the Chapter 01 of our book about Minimal API.

It was not so bad, just some fixes about some sentences. From the structure point of view, it was ok.

I created and updated a new GitHub repo with a devcontainer template to start to develop SPFx projects with Codespaces. I think I will write a blog post tomorrow.

The link of the repo: https://github.com/kasuken/SPFxGitHubDevContainer

In the morning I went to Zurich Airport to meet my team. We spent two hour together at a coffee and than we went to Microsoft for having our monthly meeting. We talked a lot about our team goal, our strategy and other stuff. After lunch a did an interactive demo about Network Guardian and I received a lot of feedbacks.

We are about to launch this product very soon.

In the evening I had to write a blog post but I was too tired.
I will do it tomorrow morning.

Mood: 😊

Tuesday

Woke up a little bit late this morning. I was tired from yesterday and I decided to sleep a little bit more.

I started the morning to finalize my blog post about Auth0 Ambassador.

https://dev.to/kasuken/i-am-officially-an-auth0-ambassador-23bi

After that I started to work on Network Guardian. After a lot of hours, finally, I have a complete flow from the user’s perspective and I pushed all my code on Azure DevOps.
I worked for a while on the balcony, just to change my environment. It was super because I did a lot of stuff done from there. I will repeat this way of work time to time.

During the afternoon I also did a call with a colleague of mine to analyze some issues from a customer about Microsoft 365 and SharePoint Online.

It was a good day from work point of view. I am happy.

Mood: 🙂

Wednesday

I started the morning with a long call with a colleague of mine and a customer.
We tried to install the solution “*Company Communicator”* to the customer tenant with poor results.

https://github.com/OfficeDev/microsoft-teams-apps-company-communicator

There are a lot of problems with the PowerShell installation.
I think tomorrow we will try with the manual installation. It takes more time, but maybe is more secure.

In the afternoon I recorded three videos for Codemotion and taken some photos for the profile.
I think they will release the final videos in few weeks.

Mood: 🤔

Thursday

We tried to install the solution manually but we failed again.
My colleague will be on vacation the next week, so I will take care of this task at the beginning of the week. I don’t have too much time because I have to finalize Network Guardian in the next days.

Mood: 🤔

Friday

I started the morning early because I wanted to go out with my bike. I don’t want to do a long session during the weekend.
And I did it.

After lunch I worked on Network Guardian. I have implemented a new feature to detect the edge location for the Microsoft 365 Endpoints.
It works very well and I will wait for the final tests the next week.

In addition the next week we have to deploy the application at the customer. It’s a big customer and we need this tool up&running.

https://twitter.com/kasuken/status/1527667312974766081

In the last 2-3 days I change my way of using the ToDo list and it works better. On my paper agenda I just block my time with the name of the project and I use notion to write down all the tasks for the projects and I also take notes about the status and the priorities.

It works very good and better than my previous way of work.

In the very late evening, I reviewed my blog post about a few commands prompt that I use everyday, but I postponed it to Saturday afternoon.

https://dev.to/kasuken/7-command-prompts-for-windows-you-must-know-52ah

Mood: 🦸
item.author: kasuken

item.title: Nuxt 和 Cloudflare，如何让 SSR 工作（2 个设置） | Nuxt and Cloudflare, how to get SSR working (2 settings)
item.description:
格雷格休姆

发表于您使用 cloudflare 有 nuxt，可能会注意到您的页面不是服务器端渲染，而是尝试在浏览器中获取数据。

在 cloudflare 中关闭 javascript 和 html 缩小以解决问题：

为什么？
似乎 cloudflare 缩小删除了 nuxt 需要运行的东西。

西蒙·潘查雷—— Apr 18 '21 21 年 4 月 18 日



原文:

GreggHume

Posted on May 22

You have nuxt with cloudflare and might notice your pages are not server side rendering and are instead trying to fetch the data in the browser.

In cloudflare switch off javascript and html minification to fix the issue:

Why?
It seems cloudflare minification removes things that nuxt needs to function.

ajcwebdev.wallet - May 3 '21

Simon Pantzare - Apr 18 '21
item.author: greggcbs

item.title: 如何在 JavaScript 中旋转字符串 | How to Rotate a String in JavaScript
item.description:
最近，我在某家公司申请了一份工作，该公司正在招聘一名 React 开发人员。 我发送了我的简历，进行了编码评估并通过了。 在此之后，我被邀请参加一个面对面的面试，我被要求在纸上写代码。

编码问题是：用您选择的编程语言编写代码，将给定的字符串旋转指定的次数。

起初我吓坏了，因为我以前没有解决过这样的问题，请记住我不是大师。 我拿起笔和纸开始写代码。

挣扎了几分钟后，我能够编写正数旋转的代码，但我不知道他们还需要代码来处理负数旋转，我的时间到了。

无论如何，我能够在回家的路上解决我脑海中的负旋转部分，我想在这里分享它，以防你遇到这样的问题。

这是旋转字符串的JS代码（处理左右旋转）：

 const rotate = (text, n) => { txtArr = text.split("") if(n>0){ for(let i = 1; i<=n; i++){ let firstel = txtArr[0] txtArr.shift() txtArr.push(firstel) } } else if(n<0){ for(let i = -1; i>=n; i--){ let lastel = txtArr[txtArr.length-1] txtArr.pop() txtArr.unshift(lastel) } } console.log(txtArr.join("")) } rotate("hello", -2)

代码说明：
我将通过所涉及的步骤解释代码：

  1. 使用text.split()方法将文本转换为数组。
  2. 使用if语句检查n是否为正， n>0 。
  3. 如果n为正：

  • 使用for循环遍历textArr n次。

  • 使用txtArr[0]获取数组中的第一个元素

  • 使用txtArr.shift()删除第一个数组元素

  • 使用txtArr.push(firstel)将第一个数组元素添加到 aaray 的末尾

使用for循环遍历textArr n次。

  • 使用txtArr[txtArr.length - 1]获取数组中的最后一个元素

  • 使用txtArr.pop()删除最后一个数组元素

  • 使用txtArr.unshift(lastel)将最后一个数组元素添加到 aaray 的开头

    • 结论

    这就是本文的全部内容。 希望你能学到一两件事。 下一篇见：）



    原文:

    Recently, I applied a job in a certain company that was hiring a React developer. I sent my CV, did a coding assessment and passed. After this I was invited for an in-person interview where I was required to write code on paper.

    The coding problem was: write code in the programming language of your choice that rotates a given string a specified number of times.

    At first I freaked out as I had not tackled such a problem before, keep in mind that I am not a guru. I took the pen and paper and started writing code.

    After struggling for a few minutes, I was able to write code for positive number rotation but I didn't know that they also required the code to also handle negative number rotation and my time was up.

    Anyway, I was able to solve the negative rotation part in my mind on my way home and I want to share it here in case you ever encounter such a problem.

    Here's is the JS code to rotate a string(handles both left and right rotation):

    const rotate = (text, n) => {
  txtArr = text.split("") 

  if(n>0){
    for(let i = 1; i<=n; i++){
      let firstel = txtArr[0]
      txtArr.shift()
      txtArr.push(firstel)
    }
  }
  else if(n<0){
    for(let i = -1; i>=n; i--){
      let lastel = txtArr[txtArr.length-1]
      txtArr.pop()
      txtArr.unshift(lastel)
    }
  }

  console.log(txtArr.join(""))
}

rotate("hello", -2)

    Code explanation:
    I will explain the code with the steps involved:

    1. Convert the text into an array using the text.split() method.
    2. Use an if statement to check whether n is positive, n>0.
    3. If n is positive:

    • use a for loop to loop through the textArr n times.

    • get the first element in the array using txtArr[0]

    • Remove the first array element using txtArr.shift()

    • Add the first array element to the end of the aaray using txtArr.push(firstel)

    4.If n is negative:

    • use a for loop to loop through the textArr n times.

    • get the last element in the array using txtArr[txtArr.length - 1]

    • Remove the last array element using txtArr.pop()

    • Add the last array element to the beginning of the aaray using txtArr.unshift(lastel)

    5.If n is equal to 0, return it as it is

    Conclusion

    That's all for this article. Hope you learn a thing or two. See you in the next one :)
item.author: kimanikevin254

item.title: 加速你的 Laravel 网站超快 - Codexashish | Speed Up Your Laravel Website Super Fast- Codexashish
item.description:
您将遵循一些技巧来超级快速地创建您的 laravel 应用程序。 所以让我们开始吧：-

每次启动 laravel 应用程序时，您的应用程序都会确定中间件、解析别名、解析路由组，并为每个单独的路由条目识别控制器操作和参数输入。 因此，您将能够想到它在生产中对您的应用程序有多糟糕。

您可以通过缓存运行此的所有路由来绕过路由处理。：-

php artisan route:cache

配置缓存呢？？ 绕过在每次应用程序启动时解析您的 .env 和配置文件，您必须运行：-

php artisan config:cache

使用 config() 访问 .env 变量，避免使用 env()

您不能在任何时候编译您的视图，只需使用预编译的刀片模板视图，尝试运行此命令即可。

php artisan view:cache

跑 ：**

php artisan event:clear

警报 ：

您需要使用以下命令清除缓存以反映任何新更改：

php artisan cache:clear php artisan view:clear php artisan route:clear php artisan clear-compiled

当您开发项目时，您可能正在使用一些开发包来跟踪查询或其他开发内容，请删除生产中不需要的那些包。

因此，只需在生产中运行一个命令，然后：

composer install --prefer-dist --no-dev -o

点击这里阅读更多

谢谢
法典



原文:

Laravel is the best back-end framework of PHP, and lots of companies are choosing Laravel for their large and medium-sized projects. SEO is incredibly important for each website. there are some tips you'll follow to create your laravel app super fast. So let's Start:-

1. Use Caching in production:

Each time you boot your laravel app , your app determines the middleware, resoles aliases, resolves route groups, and identifies the controller action and parameter inputs for each single route entry. so you'll be able to think how bad it's for your app within the production.

You can bypass route processing by caching all routes running this so.:-

php artisan route:cache

What about configuration caching ?? to bypass parsing your .env and config files on every app boot you must run:-

php artisan config:cache

use config() to access .env variables , avoid using env()

you must not compile your views whenever, just use pre-compiled blade template views, to try and do that run this command.

php artisan view:cache

**To cache a manifest of all of your app's events and listeners

run :**

php artisan event:clear

_Recreate boostrap/cache/compiled.php _

php artisan optimize

Alert :

You need to clear the cache to reflect any new changes by using the commands:

php artisan cache:clear php artisan view:clear php artisan route:clear php artisan clear-compiled

php artisan config:cache

2. Remove Dev dependencies from the composer

When you develop your project likely you may be using some Dev packages to trace queries or other development things, remove those packages that aren't required within the production.

So just run one command within the production and then.:

composer install --prefer-dist --no-dev -o

Click Here to read more

Thankyou
Codexashish

Hey everyone we all know that ReactJs is the most popular library out there to build UIs. And today let's talk about what are the factors and decisions that made ReactJs win the frontend game?

ReactJs introduced a new way to build a user interface (UIs) with Reconciliation, Virtual DOM, JSX, Concurrent React, and Suspense features.

ReactJs is closer to JavaScript than to HTML, and that's what I think is the main reason which helped ReactJs win the frontend battle.

Open-sourced in 2013 React went from an internal project at Facebook to the most successful JS library.

This is the story of ReactJs!

item.title: React v18：为什么 useEffect 突然发疯了？ | React v18: Why useEffect suddenly go crazy?
item.description:
一种苦乐参半的变化是 mount -> unmount -> remount 在严格模式下加载组件的模式。 如果您还没有亲身体验过，请做好准备，因为乍一看，在您愉快地工作的应用程序上似乎有某种黑魔法。 让我们潜水吧。

问题

让我们以这个相当简单的代码为例。 从 useEffect 中的空依赖数组来看，我们可以预期“App Loaded”会在我们的控制台中打印一次并完成。

如果您对使用此console.count方法感到困惑，请阅读此处：很棒的控制台方法。

令人惊讶的是，我们看到这条消息被打印了两次。 这就提出了一个问题，我们今天做错了什么还是喝醉了？

背景

为了理解这整个混乱，让我们首先讨论纯函数和幂等性的概念。 下图是不言自明的，我们可以看到在相同的条件下，一个函数应该产生相同的输出。 而幂等性意味着即使一个函数运行多次，结果也应该是相同的。

好吧，你一定想知道它与我们手头的问题有什么关系。 举一个实际的例子，我们打算订阅来自某个服务器的通知流，我们将其保留在 useEffect 中，期望它在用户打开我们的网站时订阅，为此目的使用空的依赖数组。 但是，正如在我们的小演示中所确定的，用 useEffect 编写的代码运行了两次，因此我们的订阅也将如此。 可能的结果可以是：

  • 我们显示两个或更多通知，具体取决于我们的组件被渲染的次数。 我们的订阅服务器可能会抛出“您已订阅”的错误。 解决方案

    今天的数学已经够多了，让我们来看看解决方法。 我找到了许多在线资源，建议使用自定义挂钩来替换使用 ref 和诸如此类的东西被黑客入侵的 useEffect。 框架倾向于通过抽象决策让我们的生活更轻松，我们发起了全面的战斗以寻找偷偷摸摸的方法。 在我们的假设示例中，它可用于取消订阅。 看看我们之前的例子，它应该是这样的：


    结论

    就像我们的 useEffect 一样，这种双重挂载使我们免于许多稍后可能进入生产的看不见的问题，正如我们在订阅示例中看到的那样。 另外，请注意，React 不会在实际生产构建中执行此挂载 - 卸载 - 挂载循环，它是通过使用 index.tsx 中的StrictMode标签提供的开发模式功能，其唯一目的是实施最佳实践。

    反应中的 StrictMode。

    连接

    🏭 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sameerkumar1612 🏭 领英： https ://www.linkedin.com/in/sameerkumar1612

    ✍️ Connect on Medium: https://sameer-kumar-1612.medium.com ✍️ 连接媒体： https ://sameer-kumar-1612.medium.com

    ✍️ Connect on Dev.to: https://dev.to/sameer1612 ✍️ 在 Dev.to 上连接： https ://dev.to/sameer1612



原文:

React version 18 has brought some very appreciable changes to the core. One such bittersweet change is in for form of the mount -> unmount -> remount pattern of loading components in strict mode. If you have not tasted this first hand, be prepared because at first glance it seems some sort of dark magic on your happily working application. Let’s dive.

Problem

Let’s take this fairly simple code for example. Judging by the empty dependency array in useEffect, we can expect “App Loaded” to be printed once in our console and be done with it.

If you are confused with the use of this console.count method, do read here: Awesome console methods.

Surprisingly, we are seeing this message being printed twice. That raises the question, are we doing something wrong or is react drunk today?

Background

To understand this whole mess let’s discuss first the concept of pure functions and idempotence. The following illustration is self-explanatory and we can see that under the same conditions, a function should produce the same output. Whereas, idempotence means that even if a function runs multiple times, the outcome should be the same.

Well, you must be wondering what it has to do with our problem in hand with react. Take a practical example, we intend to subscribe to a stream of notifications coming from a certain server and we keep it in useEffect expecting it to subscribe ONCE the user opens our website, using the empty dependency array for the purpose. But, as established in our little demo, code written in useEffect ran twice and hence will our subscription. Possible outcomes can be:

  • We are showing two or more notifications, depending on the number of times our component is rendered. [Application level pure behaviour is no more present, sometimes showing 1 notification, sometimes 83.]
  • Our subscription server may throw an error that, “You are already subscribed”. [Idempotence cries in the corner.]

Solution

Enough mathematics for the day, let’s look into the fix. “The fix” is essentially sticking to the best practices. I found many online resources, suggesting custom hooks to replace useEffect hacked with using ref and whatnot. Frameworks tend to make our life easier by abstracting decisions and we launch full-scale battles for finding ways to sneak out. Effect always provides a cleanup function which should be used to clean the work done during the effect run. It can be used to do the unsubscription in our hypothetical example. Looking at our previous example, it should be like this:


Conclusion

The react team decided to bring strict mode to these hooks for establishing best programming practices during the development phase. As in the case of our useEffect, this double mount saves us from many unseen issues that can come into the production later as we saw in our subscription example. Also, take note that React doesn't do this mount — unmount — mount cycle in an actual production build, it’s a dev mode feature provided by using the StrictMode tag in the index.tsx for the sole purpose of imposing best practices.

StrictMode in react.

To Connect

🏭 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sameerkumar1612

✍️ Connect on Medium: https://sameer-kumar-1612.medium.com

✍️ Connect on Dev.to: https://dev.to/sameer1612

item.title: 初次驾驶者的驾驶安全提示 | Driving Safety Tips For First-Time Drivers
item.description:
第一次学习开车，既令人兴奋又令人恐惧。 我们理解这个重要的人生里程碑所带来的挫败感，并希望使这个过程尽可能顺利。 这些关于安全驾驶的建议可以帮助您驾驭前方的道路，无论您是第一次开车还是拥有多年的专业知识。

慢慢加速

尽管一旦灯变绿就很想踩油门，但保持镇静至关重要。 当您逐渐提高发动机的速度时，它的性能会更好。 从完全停止到缓慢滚动，逐渐增加油门踏板的压力。
如果您要购买新车，车辆信息搜索 API将派上用场。 车辆信息搜索 API 旨在提供对车辆数据的访问。 它是有关车辆系统和协议的有用知识的大型存储库。 因此，它提供了多种了解汽车及其规格的方法。 后者提供诸如型号、制造年份和特性等信息。
它对于研究特定车辆的历史也很方便。 在您购买新车之前，您会尝试了解有关它的所有信息。 没有人愿意买一辆已经损坏的汽车，对吧？ 如果是这种情况，可能需要有关汽车以前的所有者、事故和盗窃历史的信息。 这是确保潜在更好交易的最有效技术。

保持对方向盘的控制

平稳的转向使您能够保持对车辆的控制。 无论是在转弯还是在道路上直行时，牢牢握住方向盘都是至关重要的。

轻轻刹车

避免将踏板踩到地板上，就像加速时一样。 新手司机可以学到的最重要的一课是如何识别何时停车。 如果您注意到停车标志或前方的灯变黄，请立即施加轻微的制动压力。
轻轻踩下制动踏板，直到您的汽车完全停止。

保持安全速度

当您在方向盘后变得更加舒适时，超过公布的速度限制可能很诱人。 然而，遵守限速不仅仅是遵守法律的问题。 这对于您自己和他人的安全也很重要。

交通部派工程师进行全面研究，以确定限速。 道路类型、事故历史、交通量和可视距离都是这些工程师考虑的因素。 在开车时间上节省几分钟不值得拿自己或他人的生命冒险。

保持安全距离

无论驾驶技术如何，在您和您面前的汽车之间保持适当的“缓冲”是至关重要的。 但是，作为第一次驾驶，您的反应时间本质上是较慢的。
遵循“两秒规则”将防止您追尾前方的汽车，从而增加保险费和昂贵的维修费用。

留意路标

全面了解所有道路标志、交通信号灯和路面标线。 因为您对自己的驾驶能力充满信心，所以您永远不应忽视路标或安全指示灯。 这些标志放在那里是有原因的。

明智地选择你的车道

确保您了解每条车道的用途，并留出足够的空间来转弯或改变车道。 如果您知道即将出现转弯或出口，请尽快进入最右侧的车道，以免妨碍其他司机。
只在最左边的车道（以安全的速度）通过，然后向左出口。 中央车道是长距离匀速行驶的最安全选择。

闪光灯是安全驾驶的基本特征。 如果使用得当，您的转向灯可以将您的决定和未来的动作传达给其他汽车。 谨慎使用喇叭，只是为了警告其他司机。 保持警惕并了解其他司机的行为，以便在紧急情况下迅速做出反应。 在改变车道或倒车之前，请务必检查后视镜并回头看。

学开车可能会很吓人，但只要有足够的练习和对周围其他人的认识，这将是一次安全而愉快的体验



原文:

It's both exciting and terrifying to learn to drive for the first time. We understand the frustrations that come with this major life milestone and want to make this process as smooth as possible. These recommendations for safe driving can help you navigate the road ahead, whether you're starting to drive for the first time or have years of expertise.

Speed up slowly

Although it's tempting to step on the gas pedal as soon as the light turns green, it's critical to keep your composure. When you gradually increase the speed of your engine, it performs better. From a complete stop to a slow roll, gradually increase the pressure on the gas pedal.
And if you are going to buy a new vehicle, Vehicle Information Search API will come in rescue. The Vehicle Information Search API was built to provide access to vehicle data. It's a big repository of useful knowledge about vehicle systems and protocols. As a result, it provides a variety of ways to learn about automobiles and their specs. The latter provides information such as model, year of manufacture, and characteristics.
It's also handy for researching the history of a particular vehicle. Before you buy a new car, you try to learn everything you can about it. Nobody wants to buy a car that has been damaged, right? If this is the case, information on the car's previous owners, accidents, and theft history may be required. That is the most effective technique to ensure a potentially better deal.

Maintain control of the steering wheel

Smooth steering allows you to maintain control of the vehicle. It's critical to keep a firm grip on the steering wheel both when cornering and when driving straight down the road.

Gently brake

Avoid pressing the pedal to the floor, just as you would when accelerating. One of the most crucial lessons a novice driver can learn is how to recognize when to stop. If you notice a stop sign or the light ahead of you turns yellow, immediately apply light brake pressure.
Gently press down on the brake pedal until your car comes to a complete stop.

Keep a safe speed

It can be tempting to exceed posted speed limits as you get more comfortable behind the wheel. Observing the speed limit, however, is not just a matter of following the law; it is also essential for your own and others' safety.

The Department of Transportation sends engineers to conduct a complete study in order to decide the speed limit. Road type, accident history, traffic volume, and visual distance are all factors considered by these engineers. Saving a few minutes on your drive time is not worth risking your life or the lives of others.

Keep a safe distance

Regardless of driving expertise, maintaining appropriate "cushion" between yourself and the automobile in front of you is critical. However, your reaction time is intrinsically slower as a first-time driver.
Following the "two second rule" will prevent you from rear-ending the automobile in front of you, resulting in increased insurance premiums and costly repairs.

Keep an eye out for road signs

Develop a thorough knowledge of all road signs, traffic lights, and pavement markings. Because you are confident in your driving ability, you should never disregard a road sign or a safety indicator. The signs were placed there for a reason.

Pick your lane wisely

Make sure you understand the purpose of each lane and leave enough room to turn or change lanes. If you know a turn or exit is approaching, get into the far right lane as soon as possible to avoid cutting other drivers off.
Only pass in the far left lane (at a safe speed) and exit to the left. The center lane is the safest option for driving long distances at a constant speed.

Blinkers are an essential feature of safe driving. When used appropriately, your turn signal can communicate your decisions and future movements to other cars. Use your horn sparingly and just to warn other drivers. Keep yourself vigilant and aware of the actions of other drivers so that you can react quickly in an emergency. Before changing lanes or backing up, always check your mirrors and look over your shoulder.

It might be scary to learn to drive, but with enough practice and awareness of others around you, it can be a safe and enjoyable experience
item.author: licensesearch

item.title: PWA（移动）应用：从二维码读取配置 | PWA (mobile) app: Read configuration from QR code
item.description:
这是我在 dev.to 网站上的第二篇文章。 本文展示了概念验证，可在 Android 上与 Chrome 完全兼容。

一个小背景

我是移动应用程序的粉丝，过去我曾使用 Cordova 开发过一些应用程序（HTML + CSS + JS）。 有一天我发现有PWA 应用程序，从那时起我就爱上了它们。 现在我使用Quasar 框架将应用程序编写为 PWA/SPA 应用程序。

应用需要设置

由于我开发的应用程序，其中一些使用配置，经常使用对话框。 因此，用户通过标准对话框填充/更改配置。

有时我需要对应用程序进行特殊配置（与用户无关）。 我们可以使用 QR 码代替手动填充 API 密钥（或类似的奇怪文本字符串）。 它假设我们使用 QR 库来读取 QR 码。 并且应用程序增长...

可是等等！ 我们中的许多人已经在手机上安装了QR 阅读器应用程序。 那么，我们可以通过剪贴板将其用作外部源吗？ 我们可以。 只需使用外部 QR 阅读器应用程序扫描 QR 码，它将文本/配置/任何内容存储到剪贴板。

从剪贴板粘贴

没什么新鲜的，没什么花哨的，打哈欠。 一个按钮和一个在点击事件上调用的函数。 就是这样！

香草JS代码：

 async function paste(input) { const text = await navigator.clipboard.readText(); input.value = text; }

希望这对你有帮助:-)



原文:

This is my 2nd write up on dev.to site. This article shows proof-of-concept, fully working with Chrome on Android.

A small background

I am a fan of mobile apps, I have developed a few apps (HTML + CSS + JS) using Cordova in past. One day i found out that there are PWA applications and since then I have loved them. Now I write apps as PWA/SPA ones using Quasar framework.

Apps need settings

As I have developed apps, some of them used configuration, often using dialog box. So, user fill/change configuration via standard dialog.

Sometimes I need special configuration of app (not related to user). Instead of fill API keys (or similar strange text string) manually we can use QR code. It assumes that we use QR library to mane reading QR code. And the app grows...

But wait! Many of us have QR reader app already installed on mobile phone. So, can we use it as an external source via clipboard? Yes, we can. :-)

Just scan QR code using external QR reader app, it stores text/config/whatever to clipboard.

Paste from clipboard

Nothing new, nothing fancy, yawn. One button and a function called on click event. And that's it!

vanilla JS code:

async function paste(input) {
  const text = await navigator.clipboard.readText();
  input.value = text;
}

VueJS code:

pasteFromClipboard: async function(){
  const text = await navigator.clipboard.readText();
  this.textFromClipboard = text;
}

Hope this help you :-)

item.title: 你知道创客的时间表吗？ | Do you know about the Maker's Schedule?
item.description:
几年前，我看到了 Y Combinator 创始人 Paul Graham 的一篇文章，关于程序员（即创客）和管理者的不同工作模式。 它在我最近的一次谈话中再次出现，我认为在这里分享和讨论它可能会很有趣。

制造商的时间表，经理的时间表

我认为它很好地总结了现实，尽管有些任务或工作必须从一种模式切换到另一种模式。 然而，当我安排我的一天在开始或结束时开会时，我肯定工作得最好，或者更好的是，每周只有一天。

您对此有何看法？ 在企业环境中工作时，如何有效地实施Maker's Schedule ？



原文:

A few years ago I came across an essay by Paul Graham, founder of Y Combinator, about the different working modes of programmers (i.e. makers) and managers. It came up again in a recent conversation I had, and I thought it might be interesting to share and discuss it here.

Maker's schedule, Manager's schedule

I think it sums up the reality pretty well, although there are some tasks or jobs where you have to switch from one mode to another. However, I definitely work best when I structure my day to meet at the very beginning or end, or even better, a single day a week.

What are your opinions on this? How can a Maker's Schedule be effectively implemented when working in a corporate environment?

item.title: 在 macOS 上提取 PKG | Extracting PKGs on macOS
item.description:
摄影： seth schwiet on Unsplash

假设您在一台没有管理权限的计算机上，但您确实需要使用这个软件。 就我而言，这是 Apple 的 SF Symbols 应用程序。 有一种非常简单的方法可以从包 (.PKG) 中提取有效负载。

要开始，您首先需要两件事。 一台配备 macOS 的计算机和一个内部带有 PKG 的 DMG，或者只是一个 PKG。 本教程将详细介绍两者。

提取包装内容

如果您的 PKG 在 DMG 中，请从这里开始

要从 DMG 内的 PKG 中提取有效负载，我们需要挂载 DMG。 有两种方法可以做到这一点。 您可以使用 Finder（双击 DMG 以安装它）或使用带有以下命令的终端： hdiutil attach [path to your DMG] 。 例如， hdiutil attach ~/Downloads/SF\ Symbols.dmg 。

现在是我们必须使用终端的地方。 在您的终端中，导航到您想要提取 PKG 的上方的文件夹。 示例命令如下： cd ~/Documents 。

然后，您可以继续使用以下命令提取 PKG： pkgutil --expand-full [package to PKG] [folder to extract to] 。 例如， pkgutil --expand-full /Volumes/SFSymbols/SF\ Symbols.pkg extracted_package 。

提取SF Symbols.pkg ，它具有三个目录： Distribution and Resources 、 SFSymbols.pkg 。

目录是放置文件的地方。 例如，目录Applications有SF Symbols.app ，因为它需要放在您计算机上的 Applications 文件夹中。

提取有效负载后，您可以弹出卷（如果您使用的是 DMG）或删除 PKG，因为您不再需要它。



原文:

Photo by: seth schwiet on Unsplash

Let's say you're on a computer where you don’t have administrative access, but you really need to use this one piece of software. In my case, this was Apple’s SF Symbols app. There’s a pretty simple way to extract the payload from the package (.PKG).

To get started, you first need two things. A macOS-equipped computer and a DMG with a PKG inside, or just a PKG. This tutorial will detail both.

Extracting the Package Contents

If your PKG is inside of a DMG, start here

To extract the payload from a PKG inside of a DMG, we need to mount the DMG. There are two ways to do this. You can either use the Finder (double-click the DMG to mount it) or use the terminal with the following command: hdiutil attach [path to your DMG]. For example, hdiutil attach ~/Downloads/SF\ Symbols.dmg.

PKG Extraction

Now is where we have to use the terminal. In your terminal, navigate to the folder just above where you want your PKG to be extracted. An example command is as follows: cd ~/Documents.

You can then proceed to extract the PKG with: pkgutil --expand-full [package to PKG] [folder to extract to]. For example, pkgutil --expand-full /Volumes/SFSymbols/SF\ Symbols.pkg extracted_package.

The contents of the PKG are now available in the extracted_package folder. With the SF Symbols.pkg extracted, it has three directories: Distribution and Resources, SFSymbols.pkg.

The content of the PKG is stored in the (in my case) SFSymbols.pkg folder.

The folder hierarchy of the Payload folder (extracted_package/[package name]/Payload) is very simple. The directories are the places to put the files. For example, the directory Applications has SF Symbols.app, because that needs to be put in the Applications folder on your computer.

Once you have extracted the Payload, you can eject the volume (if you are using a DMG) or delete the PKG, as you no longer need it.
item.author: hkamran

item.title: 汇合 - MQTT <-> KAFKA | Confluent - MQTT <-> KAFKA
item.description:
支持的 Spark Streaming 源

  1. 水槽
  2. 卡夫卡
  3. 文件来源
  4. 运动
  5. 推特

对于寻找 MQTT 是什么的人？
因此，为了使 mqtt 数据可用于 spark 流式传输，我们必须将 MQTT 与 Kafka 连接起来，有很多工具可以实现这一点。 其中之一是https://www.confluent.io/

按照以下步骤将您的 MQTT 设备数据放入 Kafka 队列。

安装冲突

 -> install confluent in local machine (https://www.confluent.io/installation/) -> set the path for confluent cli

检查服务状态

 confluent local services kafka status

使用 Confluent CLI 启动 KAFKA

 confluent local services kafka start

启动 KAFKA 后，启动 KAFKA CONNECT 服务

 confluent local services connect start

我们需要 mosquitto 来运行一个 MQTT 代理，它将公开我们可以发布和订阅数据的主题。
在本地启动蚊子经纪人

 brew services start mosquitto

检查我们是否可以发布到 MOSQUITTO 主题

 mosquitto_pub -h localhost -p 1883 -t temperature -m "sample-msg-1"

安装 MQTT 连接器插件

 confluent-hub install confluentinc/kafka-connect-mqtt:latest

重新启动并启动连接服务

 confluent local services connect stop && confluent local services connect start

使用以下命令检查是否安装了 MQTT 插件

 curl -s "http://localhost:8083/connector-plugins"

使用以下命令将 KAFKA 与 MQTT 代理连接

curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' http://localhost:8083/connectors -d '{ "name" : "mqtt-source", "config" : { "connector.class" : "io.confluent.connect.mqtt.MqttSourceConnector", "tasks.max" : "1", "mqtt.server.uri" : "tcp://127.0.0.1:1883", "mqtt.topics" : "temperature", "kafka.topic" : "mqtt.temperature", "confluent.topic.bootstrap.servers": "localhost:9092", "confluent.topic.replication.factor": "1", "confluent.license":"" } }'

检查连接器是否有状态：正在运行

 curl -s "http://localhost:8083/connectors" curl -s "http://localhost:8083/connectors/mqtt-source/status"

最后通过创建两个消费者进行测试

 mosquitto_sub -h localhost -p 1883 -t temperature kafka-console-consumer --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --topic mqtt.temperature --property print.key=true --from-beginning

现在如果我们将数据发布到 mqtt 主题，上面创建的两个消费者都会收到 mqtt 主题中推送的数据。



原文:

Spark structured streaming has some limitations on listening to MQTT data sources in its latest version, though there are some extensions available, they support only Spark version 2.0.

Supported Spark Streaming sources

  1. Flume
  2. Kafka
  3. file sources
  4. TCP/IP port
  5. Kinesis
  6. Twitter

For people looking for what MQTT is ?
https://mqtt.org/

So to make mqtt data available for spark to stream, we have to connect MQTT with Kafka, there are many tools available to achieve this. One such is https://www.confluent.io/

Follow the below steps to bring your MQTT device data to a Kafka queue.

INSTALL CONFLUENT

    -> install confluent in local machine (https://www.confluent.io/installation/)
    -> set the path for confluent cli

CHECK FOR THE STATUS OF SERVICES

    confluent local services kafka status

START KAFKA USING CONFLUENT CLI

    confluent local services kafka start

AFTER STARTING KAFKA, START THE KAFKA CONNECT SERVICE

    confluent local services connect start

*INSTALL MOSQUITTO *

We would need mosquitto to run an MQTT broker which will expose topics on which we can publish and subscribe data.
https://mosquitto.org/

START MOSQUITTO BROKER LOCALLY

    brew services start mosquitto

CHECK IF WE CAN PUBLISH TO THE MOSQUITTO TOPIC

    mosquitto_pub -h localhost -p 1883 -t temperature -m "sample-msg-1"

*SUBSCRIBE TO THE TOPIC AND TRY SENDING MESSAGES *

    mosquitto_sub -h localhost -p 1883 -t temperature

INSTALL THE MQTT CONNECTOR PLUGIN

      confluent-hub install confluentinc/kafka-connect-mqtt:latest

RESTART AND START THE CONNECT SERVICE

      confluent local services connect stop && confluent local services connect start

CHECK IF MQTT PLUGIN IS INSTALLED USING THE BELOW COMMAND

      curl -s "http://localhost:8083/connector-plugins"

CONNECT KAFKA WITH MQTT BROKER USING THE BELOW COMMAND

curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' http://localhost:8083/connectors -d '{
    "name" : "mqtt-source",
"config" : {
    "connector.class" : "io.confluent.connect.mqtt.MqttSourceConnector",
    "tasks.max" : "1",
    "mqtt.server.uri" : "tcp://127.0.0.1:1883",
    "mqtt.topics" : "temperature",
    "kafka.topic" : "mqtt.temperature",
    "confluent.topic.bootstrap.servers": "localhost:9092",
    "confluent.topic.replication.factor": "1",
    "confluent.license":""
    }
}'

CHECK IF THE CONNECTOR HAS A STATUS : RUNNING

      curl -s "http://localhost:8083/connectors"
      curl -s "http://localhost:8083/connectors/mqtt-source/status"

*CREATE A KAFKA TOPIC *

    kafka-topics --create --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --replication-factor 1 --partitions 1 --topic mqtt.temperature

FINALLY TEST BY CREATING TWO CONSUMERS

   mosquitto_sub -h localhost -p 1883 -t temperature
   kafka-console-consumer --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --topic mqtt.temperature --property print.key=true --from-beginning

Now if we publish the data to the mqtt topic, both the consumers created above will receive the data pushed in the mqtt topic.

item.title: 使用 Keyup 事件时从缓冲区文本表单中自定义输入大写 | Customizing Input Capitalize From Buffer Text-Form When Using Keyup Event
item.description:
发表于有时我们需要输入值来形成大写，当客户端类型像输入客户端名称时，我们可以使用正则表达式并将其与 JS 事件键结合起来。 但关键是我们只能使用 keyup 的键事件，因为当键被解除并形成新值时。 如果我们使用其他按键事件（keypress 或 keydown），则显示的值是旧值。 但是通过使用 keyup 事件，这意味着我们的浏览器需要等待输入的字符然后形成大写字母，并且有一些缓冲时间，即当我们在要创建的单词上键入大写字母时，它应该是小写的，它会显示一个后者先大写再转小写，这就是我们所说的缓冲区。 我们想要的是在没有任何缓冲区的情况下形成，所以唯一的解决方案是我们形成它时只有 keypress 或 keydown。

使用正则表达式只允许过滤字母和空格

  • 获取输入框中光标的位置

  • 如果下一个或前一个光标位置是一个空格字符并且我们输入一个空格字符然后中止它

  • 检查控制键是否仍然按下或输入值处于块模式，如果它然后中止它

  • 在文本值中添加一个新字符并设置新值和形式大写

  • 不要忘记控件是否已启动或客户端类型不是键组合（快捷键），然后阻止添加新值。

    •  function ucwords(string, trim = true) { if (string == null) { return ''; } let str = string; if (trim) { str.trim() } return str.toLowerCase().replace(/\b[az]/g, function(letter) { return letter.toUpperCase(); }); }; const inputName = document.getElementById("input-name"); let ctrl; inputName.addEventListener("keyup", function(e) { if (e.key == "Control") { ctrl = "up"; } }); inputNama.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { let pattern = /^[^a-zA-Z\s]+$/; let ceretS = e.target.selectionStart; if (pattern.test(e.key) === true) { e.preventDefault(); return false; } if (e.code == 'Space' && e.key == ' ' && (this.value.substring(ceretS, ceretS+1) == ' ' || this.value.substring(ceretS, ceretS-1) == ' ')) { e.preventDefault(); return false; } if (e.key == 'Control' || ctrl == 'down' && e.code.indexOf('Key') >= 0) { ctrl = 'down'; return false; } if (e.code.indexOf('Key') >= 0 || e.code == 'Space') { if (this.value.length > 0 && ceretS == 0 && e.target.selectionEnd == this.value.length) { return false; } this.value = ucwords(this.value.slice(0,ceretS) + e.key + this.value.slice(ceretS), false); e.target.selectionStart = ceretS+1; e.target.selectionEnd = ceretS+1; if (ctrl != 'down') { e.preventDefault(); return false; } } });

    Bruno Rezende Novais - Bruno Rezende Novais - May 21 5月21日



    原文:

    MrTSCode

    Posted on May 22

    Sometime we need input value to form Capitalize when client type like for input client name, we can use regex and combine it with JS event key. But the thing is the key event only keyup we can use, it because when key have been lifted and the new value is formed. If we use other key event (keypress or keydown) the value shown are the old value. But by using keyup event it mean our browser need to wait what char has been type then form into capitalize, and there is some buffer time that is when we type a capital letter on word we want to create that should be lowercase it will show a Capital latter first then turn it into lowercase, this is the buffer what we talk about. What we want is to form without any buffer, so the only solution is only keypress or keydown when we form it.

    The keypress is will fire after keydown so we chose keydown event.

    1. Filter only alphabet and space are allowed using regex

    2. Get position of cursor in a input box

    3. If next or prevouse cursor position is a space char and we type a space char then abort it

    4. Check is control key is still down or the input value is on block mode if it is then abort it

    5. add a new char into text value and set the new value and form capitalize

    6. dont forget if the control is up or what client type is not combination of key (shortcut key) then prevent from adding new value.

    function ucwords(string, trim = true) {
    if (string == null) {
        return '';
    }
    let str = string;
    if (trim) {
        str.trim()
    }
    return str.toLowerCase().replace(/\b[a-z]/g, function(letter) {
        return letter.toUpperCase();
    });
};

const inputName = document.getElementById("input-name");
let ctrl;
inputName.addEventListener("keyup", function(e) {
    if (e.key == "Control") {
        ctrl = "up";
    }
});

inputNama.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    let pattern = /^[^a-zA-Z\s]+$/;
    let ceretS = e.target.selectionStart;

    if (pattern.test(e.key) === true) {
        e.preventDefault();
        return false;
    }

    if (e.code == 'Space' && e.key == ' ' && (this.value.substring(ceretS, ceretS+1) == ' ' || this.value.substring(ceretS, ceretS-1) == ' ')) {
        e.preventDefault();
        return false;
    }

    if (e.key == 'Control' || ctrl == 'down' && e.code.indexOf('Key') >= 0) {
        ctrl = 'down';
        return false;
    }

    if (e.code.indexOf('Key') >= 0 || e.code == 'Space') {
        if (this.value.length > 0 && ceretS == 0 && e.target.selectionEnd == this.value.length) {
            return false;
        }
        this.value = ucwords(this.value.slice(0,ceretS) + e.key + this.value.slice(ceretS), false);
        e.target.selectionStart = ceretS+1;
        e.target.selectionEnd = ceretS+1;
        if (ctrl != 'down') {
            e.preventDefault();
            return false;
        }
    }
});
